Visitor parking is limited to two hours and requires a dashboard permit at all times.
Short-stop loading access near the service entrance is limited to fifteen minutes and is not the same as visitor parking.
After-hours building access is allowed only for agency admins and approved support employees with badge logs.
Weekend support coverage runs from 10:00 to 14:00 Beirut time for critical tenant issues only, while weekday support follows the normal office schedule.
=== PAGE BREAK ===
Rental review packages must include government ID, proof of income, and the signed viewing summary before approval.
Incomplete packages may be reviewed for formatting but must not be approved until all required documents are present.
Duplicate leads must be merged under the oldest open lead and the newer record must reference the canonical lead ID.
Agency profile settings can be edited only by agency admins.
=== PAGE BREAK ===
Complaints must be acknowledged within one business day and escalated to the duty manager if not resolved within two business days.
Routine billing questions are not complaints unless the customer explicitly disputes a charge or service failure.
Retrieval logs may be viewed only by agency admins and platform admins.
When policy evidence is insufficient, staff must say they do not have enough policy evidence and avoid guessing.
=== PAGE BREAK ===
Processed policy documents are documents with status processed after ingestion completed successfully.
Documents in pending or processing status must not be treated as approved policy evidence.
Scanned PDFs are OCR processed before chunking, but the source documents remain private and tenant scoped.
Customer phone numbers must be used only for service delivery and must not be copied into external notes without approval.
